notes:
Coordinate system: y increases downward (screen space). Radiant (Blue) base bottom-left at ancient (760,5640); Dire (Red) base top-right at ancient (5640,760). The map is symmetric under 180-degree point rotation about center (3200,3200): for any radiant point (x,y), the dire mirror is (6400-x, 6400-y).

RIVER: runs anti-diagonally along the line x+y ~= 6400 (top-left to bottom-right is the OTHER diagonal — note: the dividing river between the two bases lies along x+y=6400, i.e. from (0,6400) bottom-left... clarification: the river separates Radiant's bottom-left territory from Dire's top-right territory and therefore runs along the anti-diagonal from top-left (0,0)-ish toward bottom-right is the perpendicular). For implementation, treat the river centerline as the segment from (6400,0) to (0,6400) is the lane-of-symmetry; the river itself is the band straddling the perpendicular diagonal through center (3200,3200) running from upper-left to lower-right. The blocker rects above are coarse axis-aligned approximations of that band — engine should render an actual diagonal water strip ~240px wide and use these rects (or a polygon) for collision. Punch BRIDGE GAPS in the river band exactly where each lane polyline crosses it so creeps walk onto bridges, never water:
 - TOP lane crosses river at approx (640,3000) (radiant t1 / dire t1 region) — bridge corridor ~700px.
 - MID lane crosses river dead center at approx (3200,3200) — bridge corridor along the mid diagonal.
 - BOTTOM lane crosses river at approx (5760,3000) — bridge corridor ~700px.
Each lane polyline is authored to pass straight through its bridge gap (waypoints at the crossing sit on the bridge centerline), so creeps following waypoints stay on bridges.

LANES: 3 lanes, full polylines both directions (direPath is radiantPath reversed, lane-hugging). TOP lane hugs the west then north map edges (the long L-shaped safe lane for Radiant). BOTTOM lane hugs the south then east edges. MID lane runs straight along the anti-diagonal corner-to-corner through center. All waypoints kept >=560px from world edges for unit radius + tower placement margin.

TOWERS: 3 per lane per team. t1 nearest river (contested), t2 mid-lane, t3 nearest base. Plus 2 base/ancient towers per team flanking the ancient. Radiant t1 top at (640,3000) right at the river crossing; mirrors apply for dire.

BASES: fountain heal circle radius 360 at the back corner of each base (radiant (560,5840), dire (5840,560)); hero spawn at the ancient; shop radius 420 around the ancient. Use Blue troops/buildings for Radiant, Red for Dire (Castle_Blue / Castle_Red for ancients, Tower_Blue/Red for towers).

JUNGLE: 4 main tree clusters between lanes (one between each adjacent lane pair per side) plus 2 decorative corner groves and 6 neutral camp spots (3 per side, symmetric). Trees are blocking; camps spawn neutral creeps (use Goblin units for neutrals). Central Roshan-style pit at (3300,3300) near mid river for a high-value neutral objective.

IMPLEMENTATION NOTE for pathfinding: clamp creep movement to the lane polyline; do not run a general A* through the river except at bridges. The blocker rects are intentionally coarse — prefer a single diagonal river polygon + 3 rectangular bridge cutouts at the lane crossings for clean collision and rendering. All coordinates are in world pixels, tile size 64 (100x100 tile grid).
